name: Bean Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup great northern beans (medium-size white beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the great northern beans until very soft, then mash them to make about one cup of mashed beans.
2. Cream together the mashed beans, 1/2 cup white sugar, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1 tsp vanilla, and 1/2 tsp salt (salt can be omitted).
3. Process the rolled oats in a Cuisinart until they become flour with a little grit.
4. Mix in the oat flour, 1 tsp baking powder, and 1 tsp baking soda.
5. Chop dried apricots into small pieces and mix them in.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Form the batter into either 12 large cookies and bake for about 15 minutes, or 24 smaller cookies and bake for about 10 minutes.
